mapper.update: UPDATE notice SET readCount = readCount + 1 WHERE noticeId = #{noticeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice (userId, title, content, regDate, readCount) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, NOW(), 0)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM notice ORDER BY noticeId DESC LIMIT #{startRow}, #{pageSize}

SELECT * FROM notice n
n.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%')
n.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%')
ORDER BY n.noticeId DESC LIMIT #{startRow}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notice n
n.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%')
n.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%')
